name: WW-Minestrone Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 cup chopped canned whole tomatoes and water
1/2 cup each: carrots and celery, chopped
4 ounces drained canned white kidney beans (cannellini)
1 tablespoon fresh basil or 2 teaspoons dried, chopped
1 cup cooked small macaroni shells or elbow macaroni
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2 1/2- or 3-quart saucepan, heat oil over medium heat.
2. Add cabbage, onion, and garlic; sauté, stirring occasionally, for about 10 minutes.
3. Add broth, tomatoes, water, carrot, and celery; cook for 15 to 20 minutes longer.
4. Stir in beans, zucchini, basil, salt, and pepper; let simmer until vegetables are tender, about 15 minutes.
5. Stir in macaroni and cook until heated through. Serve sprinkled with parsley and parmesan cheese.
Each serving provides: 1 protein exchange; 1 bread exchange; 5 vegetable exchanges; 1 fat exchange; 40 calories optional exchange
Per serving: 299 calories; 14 g protein; 7 g fat; 49 g carbohydrate; 1,579 mg sodium (estimated); 1 mg cholesterol.
